summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Rebel Trade Network branding changes, orange borders, and Verified Trader Badge system. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Login page shows 'REBEL TRADE' branding with 'Exit the Matrix' tagline
Login page has orange top border on card
Register page shows 'REBEL TRADE' branding
Register page has orange top border on card
Desktop sidebar shows 'REBEL TRADE NETWORK' branding
Desktop sidebar has orange left border (2px solid #B45309)
Desktop right panel has orange left border (2px solid #B45309)
Mobile header shows 'REBEL TRADE' branding
Mobile header has orange bottom border
Mobile sidebar drawer shows 'REBEL TRADE NETWORK' branding
Mobile sidebar drawer has orange right border
Mobile bottom navigation has orange top border
Post cards have orange left border (3px solid #B45309)
Verified badge displays next to user name on posts (green badge with checkmark)
Profile panel shows 'VERIFIED TRADER' badge for verified users
Login API returns is_verified and role fields
GET /api/auth/me returns is_verified and role fields
GET /api/admin/users returns user list with verification status (admin only)
POST /api/admin/verify-trader requires admin authentication
POST /api/admin/verify-trader returns 404 for invalid user ID
context_for_next_testing_agent: Branding has been changed from HomesteadHub to Rebel Trade Network. Orange borders (#B45309) are applied to sidebar (left), right panel (left), mobile header (bottom), mobile nav (top), mobile sidebar drawer (right), and post cards (left). Verified Trader Badge system is fully implemented with backend admin endpoints for verification. Admin user (admin@homesteadhub.com) has is_verified=true and role=admin.

Branding Change.login_page: REBEL TRADE with 'Exit the Matrix' tagline
